notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, third baseman David Hamilton to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Nick Gonzales out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers singles on a fly ball to left fielder Jake Mangum. Jake Bauers to 2nd. Jake Bauers advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Jake Mangum.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn plunked
notableEvents.detail: Pirates challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Ryan O'Hearn hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales singles on a line drive to left fielder Greg Jones. Nick Yorke scores. Bryan Reynolds scores. Fielding error by left fielder Greg Jones.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo lines out to left fielder Jake Mangum.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales singles on a line drive to left fielder Greg Jones. Nick Yorke scores. Bryan Reynolds scores. Fielding error by left fielder Greg Jones.
